##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Ca_0.5_Pb_0.5_)Pb_3_Cu^2+^_6_Te^6+^_2_O_6_(Te^4+^O_3_)_6_(Se^4+^O_3_)_2_(SO_4_)_2_¬∑3H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Tombstone, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf

##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250083
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_0.51_Pb_3.49_Cu^2+^_5.85_Te^6+^_2.00_Te^4+^_6.47_Se^4+^_1.39_S_2.14_O_41_H_6.01_ ; Based on Te + Se + S = 12 and O = 41 apfu

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
